loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_mem_m_ucf_doc_place.doc_place, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.interest_arrear, sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer, '' as collateral_description, 0 as used_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memname, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_mem_m_ucf_doc_place WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.doc_place_status = sc_mem_m_ucf_doc_place.item_code ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ASC, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC
